subcodes.first_line: Verily, We entered the prison and summoned all unto God, the Lord of Lords, and We manifested the Cause and revealed it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا دخلنا السجن و دعونا الکل الی الله رب الارباب و اظهرنا الامر و انزلنا
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @firmness in the Covenant, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement
